texto: There definitely will be flying cars, but whether there'll be flying cars for most people to use, it'll probably take a long time to straighten everything out, all the rules and hassles. It'll take a while to figure out how to keep people from crashing into each other.
explicacao: Citação de Zack Greinke sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “There definitely will be flying cars, but whether there'll be flying cars for most people to use,…” articula tempo, time, rules em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como rules e people.
